sEn: Qwen2.5-VL achieves state-of-the-art performance in vision-language tasks with dynamic resolution processing and native temporal encoding.
sZh: Qwen2.5-VL 通过动态分辨率处理和原生时间编码，在视觉语言任务中达到最先进水平。
absEn: We introduce Qwen2.5-VL, the latest flagship model of Qwen vision-language series, which demonstrates significant advancements in both foundational capabilities and innovative functionalities. Qwen2.5-VL achieves a major leap forward in understanding and interacting with the world through enhanced visual recognition, precise object localization, robust document parsing, and long-video comprehension. A standout feature of Qwen2.5-VL is its ability to localize objects using bounding boxes or points accurately. It provides robust structured data extraction from invoices, forms, and tables, as well as detailed analysis of charts, diagrams, and layouts. To handle complex inputs, Qwen2.5-VL introduces dynamic resolution processing and absolute time encoding, enabling it to process images of varying sizes and videos of extended durations (up to hours) with second-level event localization. This allows the model to natively perceive spatial scales and temporal dynamics without relying on traditional normalization techniques. By training a native dynamic-resolution Vision Transformer (ViT) from scratch and incorporating Window Attention, we reduce computational overhead while maintaining native resolution. As a result, Qwen2.5-VL excels not only in static image and document understanding but also as an interactive visual agent capable of reasoning, tool usage, and task execution in real-world scenarios such as operating computers and mobile devices. Qwen2.5-VL is available in three sizes, addressing diverse use cases from edge AI to high-performance computing. The flagship Qwen2.5-VL-72B model matches state-of-the-art models like GPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet, particularly excelling in document and diagram understanding. Additionally, Qwen2.5-VL maintains robust linguistic performance, preserving the core language competencies of the Qwen2.5 LLM.
absZh: 我们推出了 Qwen2.5-VL，这是 Qwen 视觉语言系列的最新旗舰模型，在基础能力和创新功能方面均取得了显著进步。Qwen2.5-VL 通过增强的视觉识别、精确的目标定位、稳健的文档解析和长视频理解，在理解和交互世界方面实现了重大飞跃。其突出特点是能够使用边界框或点精确地定位目标。它能够从发票、表单和表格中提取稳健的结构化数据，并对图表、示意图和布局进行详细分析。为了处理复杂输入，Qwen2.5-VL 引入了动态分辨率处理和绝对时间编码，使其能够处理不同大小的图像和长达数小时的视频，并实现秒级事件定位。这使得模型能够原生感知空间尺度和时间动态，而无需依赖传统的归一化技术。通过从头训练原生动态分辨率的视觉 Transformer（ViT）并结合窗口注意力机制，我们在保持原生分辨率的同时降低了计算开销。因此，Qwen2.5-VL 不仅在静态图像和文档理解方面表现出色，还能作为交互式视觉代理，在现实场景（如操作计算机和移动设备）中进行推理、使用工具和执行任务。Qwen2.5-VL 提供三种尺寸，满足从边缘 AI 到高性能计算的各种用例。旗舰版 Qwen2.5-VL-72B 模型与 GPT-4o 和 Claude 3.5 Sonnet 等最先进模型相当，尤其在文档和图表理解方面表现优异。此外，Qwen2.5-VL 保持了稳健的语言性能，保留了 Qwen2.5 大语言模型的核心语言能力。

contrib.en: Introduces dynamic resolution processing and absolute time encoding for native perception of spatial scales and temporal dynamics.
contrib.zh: 引入动态分辨率处理与绝对时间编码，实现空间尺度与时间动态的原生感知。

contrib.en: Trains a native dynamic-resolution Vision Transformer (ViT) from scratch with Window Attention to reduce computational overhead.
contrib.zh: 从头训练原生动态分辨率视觉Transformer（ViT），结合窗口注意力机制降低计算开销。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art performance in document and diagram understanding, matching GPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet.
contrib.zh: 在文档与图表理解上达到最先进水平，媲美GPT-4o和Claude 3.5 Sonnet。

contrib.en: Enables accurate object localization using bounding boxes or points, and robust structured data extraction from invoices, forms, and tables.
contrib.zh: 支持通过边界框或点进行精确物体定位，并从发票、表单和表格中稳健提取结构化数据。

contrib.en: Functions as an interactive visual agent capable of reasoning, tool usage, and task execution in real-world scenarios like operating computers and mobile devices.
contrib.zh: 作为交互式视觉智能体，能在操作电脑和手机等真实场景中推理、使用工具并执行任务。

contrib.en: Offers three model sizes (including 72B flagship) for diverse use cases from edge AI to high-performance computing.
contrib.zh: 提供三种模型规模（含72B旗舰版），覆盖从边缘AI到高性能计算的多种用例。

limits.en: Performance on long-video comprehension may degrade for videos exceeding several hours due to computational constraints.
limits.zh: 对于超过数小时的视频，长视频理解性能可能因算力限制而下降。

limits.en: Dynamic resolution processing may introduce slight latency in real-time applications compared to fixed-resolution models.
limits.zh: 与固定分辨率模型相比，动态分辨率处理可能在实时应用中引入轻微延迟。

limits.en: The model's agentic capabilities are limited to predefined tool-use scenarios and may not generalize to novel tasks without fine-tuning.
limits.zh: 模型的智能体能力局限于预定义的工具使用场景，未经微调可能无法泛化到新任务。

limits.en: Structured data extraction accuracy depends on input quality; heavily distorted or low-resolution documents may reduce performance.
limits.zh: 结构化数据提取精度依赖输入质量；严重扭曲或低分辨率文档可能降低性能。

limits.en: The 72B model requires substantial computational resources, limiting deployment on resource-constrained devices.
limits.zh: 72B模型需要大量算力资源，限制了在资源受限设备上的部署。
